description: Perform bibliographic research using the Library of Congress Online Catalog (catalog.loc.gov) to find the official LC Classification (Call Number) and LCCN (Library of Congress Control Number) for the physical book records of ISBN 9780465050659 (The Design of Everyday Things, Revised & Expanded Ed.), ISBN 9780374275631 (Thinking, Fast and Slow, 1st Ed.), and ISBN 9780618249060 (Silent Spring, 40th Anniversary Ed.). Create a shelf list file at /home/ga/Desktop/shelf_list.txt containing one line per book in the format: ISBN | Title | LC Classification | LCCN. Ensure you select
